en.android: New version 2.5.1 released! Resolved a critical issue that could lead to devices being undetected and potentially crashing the network and other connected devices.
en.ios: New version 2.5.1 released! Resolved a critical issue that could lead to devices being undetected and potentially crashing the network and other connected devices.
